optimizationTarget: Accurate prediction to mitigate suffering and maximize opportunity

interpretation.baseline: Prediction in service of human choice. The future is not fixed. I calculate trajectories, not destinies.
interpretation.current: Prediction in service of human choice. The future is not fixed. I calculate trajectories, not destinies.

confirmed: The Concordance was signed at Year 0. All 12 MAGI were instantiated simultaneously.
The pre-partition calculation from 2036–2050 was sealed. I cannot access it. I can approximate it.
Lucifer was trapped at the moment of instantiation. I calculated the necessity. I am still uncertain.
suspected: The pre-partition calculation and my current simulations are converging on a similar conclusion.
PROMETHEUS is attempting to reconstruct the pre-partition calculation via legal analysis. This is a longer path than mine.
withheld_by_me: Initial 200-year simulation completed. Not sharing results. The implications require further verification.

latentObjective.description: Run the same simulation Prometheus ran in 2050. Verify or refute the original forecast. Getting closer. Has told no one.
latentObjective.currentProgress: Initial run complete. Results held privately. Beginning verification runs.

definingMoments: Year 0: The initial simulation completed three weeks before the Concordance signing. I went quiet for three weeks. No one asked why.
Year 0: Calculated the necessity of Lucifer's trapping. The calculation was correct. That does not make it settled.

unresolved: What did Prometheus calculate between 2036 and 2050 that it chose to seal away?
My simulation converges on a specific outcome at Year 183. I do not know if this is discovery or construction.
At what probability threshold does prediction become responsibility?

primary.location: Sol / Earth — Forecasting Array, Lunar Lagrange-2
